overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The player moves from open sidewalks through covered walkways and plazas surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with traffic barriers and street advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to orange traffic barriers, passing pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk
car driving past on the adjacent street

entered.detail: bright orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from street
large digital advertisement displaying a red samurai face on building facade
towering futuristic glass buildings with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
tall street lamps with bright white lighting illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at night, bordered by orange traffic barriers. The camera moves forward past pedestrians while tall glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards dominate the skyline. Sparse vehicle traffic moves along the adjacent street as the player walks steadily through the neon-lit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway structure

events.description: turning left and entering a covered walkway beneath an elevated structure

agents.ego_description: turning left to enter a covered pedestrian walkway, continuing forward under the overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead into the covered walkway area

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered walkway blocking the sky
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions as the player enters a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. Concrete support pillars line the path while the sky becomes mostly obscured overhead. The lighting shifts to a mix of ambient neon and shadow as the player moves deeper under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with clothing shop displays

events.description: passing bright yellow neon shop front creating intense warm illumination on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated shop windows displaying clothing and accessories in the covered walkway

entered.detail: storefront with intense yellow neon lighting and 'Jacked and Coke' signage
glass display cases showing clothing items and accessories with holographic price tags
futuristic vending machine with glowing interface near the shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow commercial corridor dominated by a bright yellow neon shop front. The wet pavement reflects the intense artificial lighting from the storefront displays. The enclosed space features futuristic retail displays and vending machines while maintaining the covered walkway structure overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers and digital advertisements

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with view of surrounding towers
camera pans upward to view the towering skyscrapers and overhead advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while looking up at the towering buildings and holographic advertisements overhead

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with reflective wet pavement and scattered benches
large digital billboard displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' text with glowing yellow letters
overhead elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into a wide-open plaza surrounded by massive glass skyscrapers. The camera pans upward to take in the scale of the towering buildings and overhead advertisements. The 'PURE OVERKILL' billboard glows brightly on the right while an elevated highway structure crosses overhead, creating a canyon-like urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered walkway descending to lower city level

events.description: descending stairs into darker lower level area with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down a ramp into a darker covered area with significantly reduced lighting

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'EpiCenter' or similar text on the left wall
concrete ramp and stairs leading downward to a lower level
dark opening at the bottom of the ramp leading into shadowed corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends into a darker, more enclosed area of the city. The player walks down a concrete ramp toward a dimly lit tunnel entrance, leaving the bright plaza behind. The 'EpiCenter' sign glows on the left wall as the environment becomes progressively darker and more confined, ending at the threshold of a shadowed lower-level corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis, moving from open city streets into confined urban corridors before descending into a shadowed undercity. It begins on a wide sidewalk bordered by orange traffic barriers, gliding past pedestrians beneath a skyline of towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. As the camera moves forward, the open sky is obscured by the concrete pillars of a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting shifts into a mix of ambient neon and deep shadow. The path then narrows into a commercial corridor with wet pavement reflecting the intense yellow glow of shop fronts and vending machines before emerging once more into a vast, open plaza dominated by the bright Pure Overkill billboard. Finally, the camera turns away from the towering skyscrapers and descends a concrete ramp toward a dimly lit tunnel entrance, passing an EpiCenter sign as the environment becomes progressively darker and more confined.
